name: Swiss Steak
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Onion, thinly sliced and separated into rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim round steak; pound well. Cut into 6-8 pieces. Mix flour, salt, and pepper. Coat beef with the flour mixture.
2. Place meat and any remaining flour mixture in a rectangular baking dish (30x20 cm or 25 cm square casserole).
3. Combine celery, onion, and green pepper in a small bowl. Microwave on HIGH (100%) until vegetables are tender, 3 to 5 minutes. Mix with the remaining ingredients and pour over beef.
4. Cover and microwave at HIGH (100%) for 5 minutes. Reduce power to MEDIUM (50%), and continue cooking until beef is tender, 40 to 50 minutes, rearranging pieces after half the cooking time.
